title: ShipKit Configuration
description: Schema for .shipkit.json configuration files used by the ShipKit plugin.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this configuration file. Default: 1

build.description: Build configuration for automatic trigger-based builds.

triggers.description: List of build triggers that watch file patterns and run commands.

watch.description: Glob patterns of files to watch for changes.

run.description: The command to run when watched files change.

stage.description: Glob patterns of output files to stage after the build command runs.

validation.description: Validation commands to run during pre-commit or CI checks.

name.description: Human-readable name for this validation step.

run.description: The shell command to execute for validation.

sensitive.description: Configuration for detecting sensitive content that should not be committed.

patterns.description: Regex patterns to match sensitive content in file contents.

files.description: Glob patterns for files that are always considered sensitive (e.g., '.env').

commit.description: Configuration for commit message formatting and attribution.

coAuthor.description: Co-author line to append to commit messages, or null to disable. Default: null

checksums.description: Configuration for file checksum tracking to detect unintended changes.

enabled.description: Whether checksum tracking is enabled. Default: false

file.description: Path to the checksums file. Default: '.checksums'

files.description: Glob patterns of files to track checksums for.

docs.description: Configuration for automatic documentation generation and dependency mapping.

dependencyMap.description: Mappings from source files to their corresponding documentation files.

docs.description: Glob patterns for documentation files that depend on the sources.

autoDetect.description: Whether to automatically detect documentation dependencies. Default: false

release.description: Configuration for release management, changelogs, and version bumping.

changelog.description: Path to the changelog file. Default: 'CHANGELOG.md'

versionFiles.description: Files that contain version strings to update during a release.

type.description: The format of the version file.

jsonPath.description: JSON path expression to the version field (only for type 'json').

tomlPath.description: TOML path expression to the version field (only for type 'toml').

pattern.description: Regex pattern to locate and replace the version string (only for type 'text').

preRelease.description: Commands to run before creating a release.

releaseBranch.description: The branch from which releases are created. Default: 'main'

pr.description: Configuration for pull request creation and management.

template.description: Path to the pull request template file.

baseBranch.description: Default base branch for pull requests. Default: 'main'

branchPrefix.description: Prefix for feature branches created for PRs (e.g., 'feature/').

allowExistingUnpushedCommits.description: Whether to allow creating a PR when there are existing unpushed commits on the branch. Default: false

ci.description: Configuration for CI integration and automated failure recovery.

maxFixCycles.description: Maximum number of automated fix attempts before giving up. Default: 3

failureHints.description: Pattern-based hints for automatically resolving CI failures.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match against CI failure output.

fix.description: Command or action to run to fix the matched failure.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this hint addresses.

resolve.description: Configuration for automatic merge conflict resolution.

autoMode.description: Whether to automatically resolve conflicts without prompting. Default: false

resolutionStrategy.description: Default strategy for resolving conflicts. 'balanced' attempts intelligent merging. Default: 'balanced'

autoSkipLowConfidence.description: Whether to skip conflicts where auto-resolution confidence is low. Default: false

continueAfterResolve.description: Whether to automatically continue the rebase/merge after resolving conflicts. Default: false

allowedOperations.description: List of git operations that auto-resolve is allowed for (e.g., 'rebase', 'merge', 'cherry-pick').

ignorePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to skip during conflict resolution.

focusAreas.description: Areas to focus on during review (e.g., 'security', 'performance', 'readability').

severityThreshold.description: Minimum severity level to report. Default: 'suggestion'

ignorePaths.description: Glob patterns for file paths to exclude from review.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes to include in review. Larger files are skipped. Default: 100000

customRules.description: Custom review rules defined by regex patterns.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match in code.

message.description: Message to display when the pattern is matched.

autoPost.description: Whether to automatically post review comments to the PR. Default: false

hotfix.description: Configuration for hotfix branch management and cherry-picking.

targetBranches.description: Branches to cherry-pick the hotfix onto.

skipCherryPick.description: Whether to skip automatic cherry-picking to target branches. Default: false

requireCleanCherryPick.description: Whether to abort if cherry-pick results in conflicts. Default: true

sync.description: Configuration for branch synchronization with upstream.

strategy.description: Strategy to use when syncing branches. Default: 'rebase'

baseBranch.description: The base branch to sync from. Default: 'main'

syncUpstream.description: Whether to fetch and sync from the upstream remote. Default: false

preferUpstream.description: Whether to prefer upstream changes over origin when syncing. Default: false

runValidationAfterSync.description: Whether to run validation commands after syncing. Default: false

autoStash.description: Whether to automatically stash and restore local changes during sync. Default: true

cleanup.description: Configuration for branch cleanup and stale branch management.

protectedBranches.description: Branch names or patterns that should never be deleted.

deleteRemote.description: Whether to also delete remote branches during cleanup. Default: false

staleDays.description: Number of days of inactivity before a branch is considered stale. Default: 30

autoConfirmLocal.description: Whether to skip confirmation when deleting local branches. Default: false

smokeTests.description: Configuration for smoke test execution after deployments or releases.

command.description: The shell command to execute smoke tests.

reportDir.description: Directory to store smoke test reports. Default: '.shipkit/reports'

retries.description: Number of times to retry failed smoke tests. Default: 0

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for the smoke test run. Default: 300

codeQuality.description: Configuration for code quality checks and slop detection.

slopPatterns.description: Regex patterns that indicate low-quality or 'slop' code to flag.

ignoreFiles.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from code quality checks.

autoFix.description: Whether to automatically apply fixes for detected issues. Default: false

dir.description: Base directory for creating worktrees. Default: '.worktrees'

lockDir.description: Directory for worktree lock files. Default: '.worktrees/.locks'

maxLockAgeDays.description: Maximum age in days for a lock file before it is considered stale. Default: 7

cleanupOnSuccess.description: Whether to automatically remove a worktree after its task completes successfully. Default: true

branchPrefix.description: Prefix for branches created within worktrees. Default: 'wt/'
